title: Services & Solutions
headerTitle: Custom mobile engineering built for scale, performance, and stability.
headerDesc: From multiplatform system architecture and KMP/CMP shared logic to end-to-end Native Android and Flutter production app launches.

android-native.title: Native Android & Hardware Integration
android-native.description: High-performance native Android apps engineered with Jetpack Compose, Kotlin, and MVI/MVVM patterns. Specialized in IoT medical hardware drivers, Agora/Twilio video SDKs, Android TV, and secure payment processing.

kmp.title: Kotlin & Compose Multiplatform (KMP/CMP)
kmp.description: Shared business logic and reactive UI across Android and iOS using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) and Compose Multiplatform (CMP)—cutting codebase duplication while retaining 100% native execution speed.

flutter.title: Flutter Cross-Platform Engineering
flutter.description: Scalable, high-fidelity cross-platform apps built with Flutter, BLoC/Riverpod, and Dio. Designed for fast time-to-market, complex REST/SOAP integrations, and high-conversion UI/UX.

architecture.title: Mobile Architecture & Codebase Modernization
architecture.description: Refactoring monolithic codebases into modular Clean Architecture, migrating Java to Kotlin, and tuning app stability to achieve 99%+ crash-free session rates[cite: 1].
